name: Quillpay
description: Quillpay is a large enterprise in fintech / digital payments, founded in 2010 and headquartered in Austin, Texas, USA. It employs roughly 9,800 people, reports about $34M in annual revenue, and is listed on the NASDAQ. It is best known for its app-only current accounts and instant transfers, serving an estimated 28 million customers. It operates online at quillpay.example, under the brand Quillpay, on social as @quillpay_support, led by CEO Rosalind Kanter. Monitored assets include domain, brand, social handle, executive, bank account, phone; tracked digital-risk threats include phishing, data leak, impersonation, scam, online threat, financial fraud.
protect_summary: Protect the payments domain, brand, support channel, and finance executive from phishing and financial fraud.

protect_summary: Protect the storefront domain, brand, mobile app, and checkout flow from counterfeit sellers and payment fraud.
